case_title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES vs. DAWSON, MARILYN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF RENT CONTROL EXEMPTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAWSON, MARILYN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 58 WEST BROOK COURT #34, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. CCP 415.46.
